topic: Tri-system investigation of system-spec-kit, system-skill-advisor, and system-code-graph grounded in the 027 epic and current shipped state: uncover missed bugs, broken features, documentation drift, code/README misalignment, feature refinement needs, and new feature opportunities — one research angle per iteration across 50 angles

reducer.note: Read-only analysis seats; the orchestrating session writes iterations/, deltas/, and state per the proven dispatch pattern.
